title: helictochloa marginata var. font-queriana
intro: Helictochloa marginata var. font-queriana, also known as Spanish bent or bent grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. Helictochloa marginata var. font-queriana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
